_amendment_log: LOGGED AMENDMENT 2026-06-01: history_length 125 -> 250, usable_validation_days 4 -> 29 (raw 25->50 minus PURGE_DAYS=20+EMBARGO_DAYS=1). Reason: Phase-1 walk-forward window extension per feature-plans/walk-forward-overhaul.md (Gate-2 approved 2026-06-01). The prior comment on this fixture said 'do NOT silently update' — this is the explicit, committed Amendment. The arithmetic cross-checks in test_oos_fold_collapse.py and test_wf_window_250_oos_constant.py are preserved.

usable_window_post_purge.comment: PURGE+EMBARGO=21 is applied at the train|validation boundary (strips the last 21 of train) AND at the validation|frozen-eval boundary (strips the last 21 of validation). The frozen-eval fold is NOT purged on its trailing edge — it is the held-out final block. Usable validation post-purge = 50 - 21 = 29 days. (Amendment: was 25-21=4 at 125 days; now 50-21=29 at 250 days. The ~29-day usable validation window is the primary motivation for the Phase-1 window extension.)

operator_visibility_field.comment: The optimization_results return dict must expose the usable-window day-counts so the operator sees the thin-window cost on every autotune cycle. This is the OPTUNA-4 Path B operator-visibility contract.

docstring_required_phrases.comment: OPTUNA-4 Path B revised contract (Option 1: honesty framing, no compensation claim). The run_autotuner docstring must explicitly carry: (a) the new field name `eval_window_days` so the next reader can find the operator-visibility surface; (b) the phrase `power limitation` acknowledging that the usable validation window is a STATISTICAL POWER deficit, not a tolerated defect; (c) the engine-audit honesty wording `cost of honest OOS reporting`; (d) a pointer to the future-workstream remediation path naming `purged k-fold` (López de Prado 2018 Ch. 7.4) so the next reader sees the methodologically-clean fix is recovering power not arguing the cost away; (e) a citation to `Bailey` & López de Prado 2014 (Deflated Sharpe Ratio) as the canonical (N, T) joint framework future workstreams should consider. The substring `Bailey` is the load-bearing token — any future reader Ctrl-F-ing for the joint (N, T) framework finds it via the author surname.

phrases: scales with the trials attempted, not the days observed
docstring_forbidden_phrases.comment: OPTUNA-4 Path B revised contract — negative pattern set. None of these phrases may appear in the run_autotuner docstring. They are the category-confusion phrasings flagged by opt-optuna4's BLOCK on ebbe571: each fuses BHY's multiplicity-correction property with a claim of statistical-power substitution. The BHY haircut addresses cross-trial selection bias INDEPENDENTLY of day count; that is a FEATURE of BHY, not the JUSTIFICATION for a thin per-trial window. If any phrase from this list reappears, the same methodology error re-enters the codebase. This test is the door that does not reopen.

source_comment_required_phrases.comment: The source comment co-located with `_OOS_USABLE_VALIDATION_DAYS_EXPECTED` (autotuner.py near line 263) must carry the honesty framing AND the future-workstream/joint-(N,T)-framework pointers, and must NOT carry any of the BHY-compensation phrasings. Per opt-optuna4 note #3 the BHY-compensation paragraph is replaced wholesale, not edited.

named_constant.name: _OOS_USABLE_VALIDATION_DAYS_EXPECTED
named_constant.comment: Module-level pinned constant naming the expected usable validation day-count at the 250-day operator-data-budget (Amendment: was 4 at 125 days). A drift in this value indicates either (a) the operator-data-budget changed or (b) PURGE/EMBARGO drifted; both must surface as Amendments, not silent slide-ins.

citation_sources.ldp_2018: López de Prado 2018, Advances in Financial Machine Learning, Ch. 7.4 (purged k-fold CV, frozen-eval discipline)
citation_sources.harvey_liu_2015: Harvey & Liu 2015, Backtesting, J. Portfolio Management 42(1), 13-28 (BHY multiplicity correction — addresses cross-trial selection bias, NOT per-trial signal reliability)
citation_sources.bailey_lopez_de_prado_2014: Bailey & López de Prado 2014, The Deflated Sharpe Ratio (canonical joint (N, T) framework — accounts for trial count AND sample length)
citation_sources.block_provenance: opt-optuna4 BLOCK on ebbe571 — BHY compensation claim is methodologically wrong (category confusion between multiplicity correction and statistical-power substitution)
citation_sources.phase1_amendment: Phase-1 walk-forward window extension (feature-plans/walk-forward-overhaul.md, Gate-2 approved 2026-06-01) — history_length 125->250, usable_validation_days 4->29
